title: Uppercut Enchantment
description: This is a mod for the Fabric Loader that adds a useful enchantment: Uppercut (levels 1-3).
body:
**⚠️Important⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

<hr>

**Mod Description**

**Uppercut Enchantment** is a Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Mod Loader**, that adds the _Uppercut_ enchantment, which can only be applied onto swords. Just like the name, this enchantment 'uppercuts' hit entities, making them get tossed into the air higher than they normally would without it; and an uppercut-like sound plays from the victim. This enchantment has a max of **3** levels. Here are the new **Y velocity modifiers** with this enchantment, **I**-**III** (in blocks, estimated):

Level **I**: 1.15

Level **II**: 4.00

Level **III**: 8.20

Take a look at this mod's **Gallery Tab**, or play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, for a visual.

<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nrQADfdAlKY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
